notes: Firm-discovery source list. Decoupled from code so we can add sources without redeploys. Each entry is one canned query against one provider. Providers are called serially with backoff; the agent deduplicates into si_firm_candidates by (name, address).

roofing.label: Roofing contractors (residential + storm-damage)
roofing.rationale: Best ROI for the existing Texas-flood PPL + the leading mass-tort lead category. Year-round demand, emergency spike after hail/wind/flood.

state_boards.label: Texas Dept of Insurance - Public Roofing Adjuster / Contractor listings
state_boards.note: TDI does not publish a single CSV; pages exist for registered roofers / public adjusters. Manual scrape of subpages is needed for fuller coverage.

state_boards.label: Texas does NOT require general roofers to be state-licensed. Jurisdiction is municipal. So OSM is the primary free source; supplement with Yelp Fusion when API key available.

hvac_plumbing.label: HVAC + Plumbing service contractors
hvac_plumbing.rationale: Year-round demand, biggest TAM in residential trades. No state licensing aggregator; OSM is primary free source.

state_boards.label: Texas does NOT state-license residential plumbers at the journeyman level. Cities handle it. OSM + county records are primary.

mass_tort_attorneys.label: Mass-tort plaintiff attorneys (TX + CA)
mass_tort_attorneys.rationale: Different business model: firms pay per signed case ($200-$500 each). Higher per-firm value than leads, fewer firms needed. CA bar has a public CSV; TX State Bar publishes a search portal.

state_boards.label: California State Bar - Attorneys who list 'Mass Torts' / 'Class Actions' practice areas
state_boards.note: CA bar has public attorney search. Filter by practice area = mass tort or class action. Search page is reachable, no auth. Listings include firm name, address, phone.

state_boards.label: Texas State Bar - Advanced Attorney Search
state_boards.note: TX bar has public attorney search. Firm name + city filters, public listings.
